summary: Iteration 7 - Complete testing of PWA feature improvements: Customer Dashboard filters, Admin Appointments filters/sorting, cache invalidation, mobile UI, PWA standalone mode. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All admin management pages (Services, Gallery, Videos, Staff, Settings) properly call invalidateCache() after CRUD operations
Customer Dashboard has filter tabs (All, Pending, Confirmed, Completed) with counts implemented correctly
Admin Appointments has search input, status filter dropdown, date filter, and 'Newest First' sort option working
Mobile viewport has no horizontal scroll - responsive design working properly
manifest.json correctly has display: standalone and display_override: [standalone, minimal-ui] for PWA mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PWA improvements verified working. Customer Dashboard has filter tabs with counts. Admin Appointments has search, status filter, date filter, and 'Newest First' sorting. Cache invalidation triggers on all 5 admin management pages (Services, Gallery, Videos, Staff, Settings). Mobile layout tested on 390x844 viewport - no horizontal scroll. manifest.json has proper standalone PWA settings.
